name: extend-schema-builder
title: Schema Builder
author: Extend UI contributors
description: Builds nested extraction schemas with sortable properties, enum editing, controlled state, and a synchronized JSON view.

changes: Converted directional table borders, text alignment, indentation, drag handles, and trailing controls to logical RTL-aware utilities.
Disabled dnd-kit inline sortable transitions under reduced motion and removed transitions from drag handles when requested.
Narrowed the forwarded input event type for React 19 without changing runtime behavior.

notices: Direct dependency licenses are recorded in registry/sources/extend-ui/DEPENDENCIES.md.

modifications.change: Converted directional table borders, text alignment, indentation, drag handles, and trailing controls to logical RTL-aware utilities. Disabled dnd-kit inline sortable transitions under reduced motion and removed transitions from drag handles when requested. Narrowed the forwarded input event type for React 19 without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Keep the source-backed editor usable in RTL and prevent drag-reorder animation from overriding reduced-motion preferences. Preserve the existing callback behavior while satisfying React 19's more specific input-event type.
